categories.title: Data Sovereignty
categories.description: Projects that protect, encrypt, store, control access to, and manage residency of data.

items.name: etcd
items.summary: Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system.

items.name: Rook
items.summary: Storage orchestration for Kubernetes, turning distributed storage systems into self-managing services.

items.name: TiKV
items.summary: A distributed transactional key-value database, based on the design of Google Spanner and HBase.

items.name: Vitess
items.summary: MySQL-compatible, horizontally scalable, cloud-native database solution.

items.name: Strimzi
items.summary: Apache Kafka running on Kubernetes. Provides operators to deploy and manage Kafka clusters.

items.name: NATS
items.summary: High-performance connective technology for distributed systems. Cloud native messaging and streaming.

items.name: CloudEvents
items.summary: A specification for describing event data in a common way, enabling interoperability across services.

items.name: Longhorn
items.summary: Cloud-native distributed block storage for Kubernetes.

items.name: CubeFS
items.summary: Cloud-native distributed storage platform supporting S3, POSIX, and HDFS interfaces.

items.name: Harbor
items.summary: An open source trusted cloud native registry project that stores, signs, and scans content.

items.name: Infinispan
items.summary: Open source distributed in-memory data grid and highly scalable NoSQL cloud data store.

items.name: OpenEBS
items.summary: A widely deployed open source container-native storage platform for stateful applications on Kubernetes.

items.name: CloudNativePG
items.summary: Comprehensive platform to seamlessly manage PostgreSQL databases within Kubernetes environments.

items.name: Vineyard
items.summary: An in-memory immutable data manager providing zero-copy data sharing across big data and AI systems.

items.name: ORAS
items.summary: OCI registry client for managing content like artifacts, images, and packages.

categories.title: Technical Sovereignty
categories.description: Stack ownership, portability, container runtimes, interoperability, and avoiding vendor lock-in.

items.name: Kubernetes
items.summary: Open-source system for automating deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications.

items.name: CRI-O
items.summary: Open Container Initiative-based implementation of Kubernetes Container Runtime Interface.

items.name: containerd
items.summary: An open and reliable container runtime, industry standard for container execution.

items.name: Crossplane
items.summary: Cloud native control plane framework for building control planes without writing code.

items.name: Helm
items.summary: The Kubernetes Package Manager. Find, share, and use software built for Kubernetes.

items.name: KubeVirt
items.summary: Kubernetes Virtualization API and runtime to define and manage virtual machines alongside containers.

items.name: Knative
items.summary: Developer-focused serverless application layer, a complement to existing Kubernetes application patterns.

items.name: Podman
items.summary: A daemonless container engine for developing, managing, and running OCI containers and pods.

items.name: Buildah
items.summary: A tool to build OCI container images without requiring a running daemon.

items.name: Devfile
items.summary: Kube-native API for cloud development workspace specification and portable developer environments.

items.name: OpenShift
items.summary: Enterprise Kubernetes platform for hybrid and multi-cloud deployments with built-in security and automation.

items.name: KubeEdge
items.summary: Kubernetes native edge computing framework extending cloud-native capabilities to the edge.

items.name: Metal3-io
items.summary: Bare metal host provisioning integration for Kubernetes, enabling infrastructure-as-code for physical servers.

items.name: crun
items.summary: A fast and lightweight fully featured OCI runtime written in C.

items.name: Buildpacks
items.summary: Transform application source code into images that run on any cloud using Cloud Native Buildpacks.

items.name: Flatcar Container Linux
items.summary: A community Linux distribution designed for container workloads, with high security and low maintenance.

items.name: k3s
items.summary: Lightweight Kubernetes distribution for edge, IoT, CI, and ARM deployments.

categories.title: Operational Sovereignty
categories.description: Running, automating, and evolving services independently without critical foreign dependency.

items.name: Argo
items.summary: Kubernetes-native tools to run workflows, manage clusters, and do GitOps right.

items.name: Flux
items.summary: Open and extensible continuous delivery solution for Kubernetes, powered by GitOps Toolkit.

items.name: Tekton
items.summary: A cloud-native Pipeline resource for Kubernetes CI/CD.

items.name: Ansible
items.summary: Radically simple IT automation platform that makes applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain.

items.name: Operator Framework
items.summary: SDK for building Kubernetes applications. High level APIs, useful abstractions, and project scaffolding.

items.name: KEDA
items.summary: Kubernetes-based Event Driven Autoscaler. Scale any container based on events from various sources.
items.redhatProduct: Red Hat OpenShift Custom Metrics Autoscaler Operator

items.name: Open Cluster Management
items.summary: Multi-cluster management with a hub-spoke architecture for fleet-wide governance and workload placement.

items.name: Karmada
items.summary: Open, multi-cloud, multi-cluster Kubernetes orchestration for workload distribution.

items.name: cert-manager
items.summary: Automatically provision and manage TLS certificates in Kubernetes.

items.name: CoreDNS
items.summary: CoreDNS is a DNS server that chains plugins, providing flexible and extensible DNS for Kubernetes.

items.name: Shipwright
items.summary: Framework for building container images on Kubernetes, supporting multiple build strategies.

items.name: Konveyor
items.summary: Tools for modernizing and migrating applications to Kubernetes, analyzing dependencies and risks.
items.redhatProduct: Red Hat Migration Toolkit for Applications

items.name: OpenKruise
items.summary: Automated management of large-scale applications on Kubernetes with advanced rolling and sidecar strategies.

items.name: Volcano
items.summary: A cloud native batch system for high-performance workloads such as AI/ML, big data, and HPC on Kubernetes.

items.name: OpenGitOps
items.summary: Set of open-source standards, best practices, and community-focused education for GitOps.

items.name: OpenTofu
items.summary: Open source infrastructure as code tool to safely and predictably provision and manage infrastructure.

items.name: Backstage
items.summary: Open framework for building developer portals, enabling engineering teams to manage services and infrastructure.

categories.title: Assurance Sovereignty
categories.description: Audit, security monitoring, identity, policy enforcement, supply chain integrity, and compliance verification.

items.name: Falco
items.summary: Cloud-native runtime security tool for Linux, detecting abnormal behavior and threats in real time.

items.name: Open Policy Agent
items.summary: General-purpose policy engine that enables unified, context-aware policy enforcement across the stack.

items.name: Kyverno
items.summary: Kubernetes native policy management for validation, mutation, generation, and cleanup of resources.

items.name: Keycloak
items.summary: Open source identity and access management solution for modern applications and services.

items.name: SPIFFE
items.summary: Secure Production Identity Framework for Everyone. A set of standards for identifying software services.

items.name: SPIRE
items.summary: The SPIFFE Runtime Environment, implementing SPIFFE APIs for workload identity in production.

items.name: Sigstore
items.summary: Signed artifacts and transparency logs for software supply chain integrity.

items.name: in-toto
items.summary: Framework for securing the software supply chain through metadata and attestations.

items.name: Notary Project
items.summary: Standards-based container signing and verification for supply chain security.

items.name: TUF
items.summary: A framework for securing software update systems, protecting against key compromise and rollback attacks.

items.name: Clair
items.summary: Vulnerability static analysis for containers, scanning images for known security issues.

items.name: KubeLinter
items.summary: Analyzes Kubernetes YAML files and Helm charts, checking against security and best-practice rules.

items.name: OpenSCAP
items.summary: NIST Certified SCAP 1.2 toolkit for security compliance scanning and remediation.

items.name: OSCAL-Compass
items.summary: Tools enabling creation, validation, and governance of compliance documentation as code.

items.name: Kuadrant
items.summary: Combines Gateway API and Istio-based controllers for connectivity, rate limiting, and auth policy.

items.name: KubeArmor
items.summary: Runtime protection for Kubernetes with observability and policy enforcement for workloads.

items.name: Kubewarden
items.summary: Policy engine powered by WebAssembly for Kubernetes admission control with CEL and Rego support.

items.name: external-secrets
items.summary: Operator that reads from external secret stores and injects values as Kubernetes Secrets.

items.name: Confidential Containers
items.summary: Enabling cloud native confidential computing by leveraging hardware-based trusted execution environments.

items.name: Copa
items.summary: CLI tool for directly patching container image vulnerabilities without full rebuilds.

items.name: gRPC

items.summary: Ultralight service mesh adding security, observability, and reliability to Kubernetes without complexity.

items.name: Cilium

items.name: Dapr
items.summary: Portable runtime for building distributed applications across cloud and edge, event-driven and resilient.

items.name: Kiali

items.name: NetObserv

items.summary: Horizontally scalable, highly available, multi-tenant, long-term storage for Prometheus.

items.name: Hubble
items.summary: Network, service, and security observability for Kubernetes using eBPF.
